rules.message: CV-173 is usually filed with CV-172 (when publication service).
Filing CV-173 requires companion form CV-FM-072.
Filing CV-173 requires companion form CV-FM-202.
You indicated an attachment ('Of which the') — make sure the document is actually attached to the filing.
